name: golang-golang-x-sys-dev
title: golang-golang-x-sys-dev
summary: Low-level interaction with the operating system
description:
Low-level interaction with the operating system
This repository holds supplemental Go packages for low-level interactions with
the operating system.
.
The primary use of this package is inside other packages that provide a more
portable interface to the system, such as "os", "time" and "net". Use those
packages rather than this one if you can.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-sys-dev because Low-level interaction with the operating system.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-sys-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-sys-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-sys-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
